violations.text: Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

The receiving door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The floor in front of the walk-in cooler and receiving area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
